nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 尼卡高原
nodes.summary: 尼卡高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Verreaux's eagle、Ludwig's double-collared sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 安哥拉
nodes.summary: 安哥拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联230种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Black guinea fowl、Western crested guinea fowl等230种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Ludwig's double-collared sunbird
nodes.summary: Ludwig's double-collared sunbird（Ludwig's double-collared sunbird，学名 Cinnyris ludovicensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于安哥拉、尼卡高原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Ludwig's Double-collared Sunbird Ludwig's double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris ludovicensis) or the montane double-collared sunbird, is a small passerine bird which breeds in forested mountains above in western Angola as well as the Nyika Plateau of northern Malawi and northeastern Zambia. This bird is sometimes considered to be con-specific with the greater double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris afer). It is sometimes placed in the genus Nectarinia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Ludwig's Double-collared Sunbird Ludwig's double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris ludovicensis) or the montane double-collared sunbird, is a small passerine bird which breeds in forested mountains above in western Angola as well as the Nyika Plateau of northern Malawi and northeastern Zambia. This bird is sometimes considered to be con-specific with the greater double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris afer). It is sometimes placed in the genus Nectarinia
